name: SVB collapse
why_anchor: Entity-rich, sharp emergence, well-documented timeline. Wire reports midday March 9; mass coverage by March 10.

name: GameStop short squeeze
why_anchor: Distinctive vocabulary, abrupt onset. Tests whether the system handles entity-driven narratives outside pure macro. Note: some macro framings emerged (retail-driven volatility, market structure).

name: COVID market crash
why_anchor: Largest single-narrative event in window. Multi-week unfolding tests whether the system tracks long-tail emergence rather than just initial spike.

name: Brexit aftermath
why_anchor: Long-tail narrative with clear ignition. US press coverage is dense. Tests the geographic-scope criterion (UK event, US press coverage).

name: FTX collapse
why_anchor: Entity-rich, fast emergence. Tests crypto-as-macro framing — included only because it generated extensive macro discourse on contagion and financial-system implications.

name: Transitory inflation debate
why_anchor: Slower, more diffuse but well-documented narrative arc — Apr 2021 emergence, peak debate Q3, narrative collapse Nov 2021 with Powell's 'time to retire transitory' remark.
tolerance_note: Wider tolerance (30 days) appropriate for gradual narratives — the plan's 14-day default is calibrated to sharp events.

name: Credit Suisse stress and UBS rescue
why_anchor: Adjacent to SVB; tests cluster differentiation. Should be a SEPARATE narrative from SVB despite topical proximity, OR a sub-cluster within a banking-contagion super-cluster — both are defensible outcomes.
differentiation_test: Should not collapse into anchor_01_svb. Acceptable: separate narrative, OR child of a banking-contagion parent cluster at coarse level.

name: Regional banking contagion fears
why_anchor: Tests narrative branching from anchor events. Should emerge AFTER SVB anchor (within 4 days) and persist through First Republic failure (May 1, 2023).
branching_test: Should branch from SVB at fine granularity but possibly merge at coarse granularity.

name: 2022 inflation peak narrative
why_anchor: Multi-month evolving narrative. Inflation prints peaked June 2022 (9.1% headline); narrative built through Q2, peaked alongside, decayed through Q4. Tests sustained-narrative tracking.
tolerance_note: Wider tolerance (30 days) appropriate for gradual narratives.

name: Soft landing emergence
why_anchor: Recent, slow emergence, uncontested timing. Tests modern-period detection and sustained tracking. Narrative still active in 2024 but stage classification should track its evolution.
tolerance_note: Wider tolerance (30 days) appropriate for gradual narratives.
